modules.sql: WITH target AS (SELECT CASE strftime('%w', MAX(ifw_effective_date)) WHEN '6' THEN date(MAX(ifw_effective_date), '-1 day') WHEN '0' THEN date(MAX(ifw_effective_date), '-2 days') ELSE MAX(ifw_effective_date) END AS target_date FROM card_transactions), customer_latest AS (SELECT c.id, c.first_name, c.last_name FROM customers c INNER JOIN (SELECT id, MAX(ifw_effective_date) AS max_ifw_effective_date FROM customers GROUP BY id) latest ON c.id = latest.id AND c.ifw_effective_date = latest.max_ifw_effective_date) SELECT ct.customer_id, COALESCE(cl.first_name, '') AS first_name, COALESCE(cl.last_name, '') AS last_name, CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS txn_count, SUM(ct.amount) AS total_spending, t.target_date AS ifw_effective_date FROM card_transactions ct CROSS JOIN target t LEFT JOIN customer_latest cl ON ct.customer_id = cl.id WHERE ct.ifw_effective_date = t.target_date GROUP BY ct.customer_id, cl.first_name, cl.last_name, t.target_date
